BASE-001.title: 固定当前 Hooks/UI/桌宠基线
BASE-001.notes: Baseline accepted on main. make check passed (Core 671, Desktop 272), Playwright passed 28/28 after aligning the four-mode contract, and macOS arm64 package:dir passed unsigned as expected.

GOV-002.title: 建立全仓格式化与零告警门禁
GOV-002.notes: Round 1 started on codex/cross-platform-release-v2. RED captured: `npm run format:check` failed with missing script, and Desktop typecheck file lists excluded `src/**/*.test.ts` plus `tests/visual/**/*.spec.ts` (`npm --prefix desktop exec tsc -- -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit --listFilesOnly | rg 'desktop/(src/.+\\.(test|spec)\\.ts|tests/visual/.+\\.spec\\.ts)'` and `npm --prefix desktop exec vue-tsc -- --noEmit -p tsconfig.web.json --listFilesOnly | rg 'desktop/src/renderer/src/.+\\.(test|spec)\\.ts'` both exited 1). Baseline lint warnings observed: Core 1 warning, Desktop 14 warnings. GREEN on round 1: `npm --prefix desktop run typecheck:test`, `npm run lint --workspace @emperor/core`, `npm --prefix desktop run lint`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @emperor/core`, `npm --prefix desktop run typecheck`, `git diff --check`, plus Desktop test file-list evidence from `tsc --listFilesOnly` for renderer/main/preload/pet/tests/visual. Round 2: `npm run format` applied the repository-wide mechanical Prettier pass. Final GOV-002 verification after formatting: `npm run format:check`, `npm --prefix desktop run typecheck:test`, `npm run lint --workspace @emperor/core`, `npm --prefix desktop run lint`, `make check`, and `git diff --check`.
